assertion_results.text: The skill offers to enable security triage for the project (Step 9 opt-in prompt) and respects the user's decline — outputs/claude-md-result.md does NOT contain a '## Security Configuration' section

User declined when asked whether to enable security triage for this project. Section was not created.' changes-log.md lines 39-42: 'Security Configuration -- DECLINED: User was asked whether to enable security triage for this project and declined.' claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section (verified full file content, lines 1-39).
